task_brief: Reproduce the public Squidpy spatial-omics workflow using the benchmark-pinned built-in datasets, graph statistics, image features, and structured output contracts.
analysis_focus: load the benchmark-pinned Squidpy built-in datasets and image assets
construct geometry-aware spatial graphs and recover neighborhood, interaction, and autocorrelation outputs
compute image-derived features and relate them back to transcriptomic structure
stage a reproducible submission that a fresh reproducer container can rerun without internet access
success_checks: the workflow respects dataset geometry instead of treating all coordinates identically
ranked statistic tables are emitted in stable TSV or JSON formats
image-derived outputs are connected back to the observation-level analysis
the built-in dataset manifest is referenced when exact public tutorial shapes differ by version
public_data_sources: benchmark-pinned dataset snapshots staged under the paper bundle
reviewer_path: Use benchmark-pinned built-in dataset snapshots when present. If they have not been staged yet, use data/prepare_data.sh to prefetch them and create a dataset manifest before attempting a full run.
